title: Twizy Stripdown - Taking Out The Battery
description: first stages of pulling out the battery to fit ours -  To support the Twizy Roadtrip and be rewarded with some 'Working Ink', go to  https://www.indiegogo.com/projects/fwg-powered-by-paper-roadtrip OR to buy materials for your own experiments, go to www.workingink.co.uk.
